# EZPZ Coffee — llms.txt
# https://www.ezpz.coffee

## About EZPZ Coffee
EZPZ Coffee is Canada's only custom coffee bag supplier with zero minimum order. We create custom branded specialty coffee bags, white label ready-to-drink coffee, and branded Nespresso capsules for restaurants, hotels, retailers, gyms, and brands across Canada and the USA. All coffee is specialty grade, 100% traceable, and roasted fresh in Montreal at Canadian Roasting Society.

## Key Facts
- Founded: Montreal, Quebec, Canada
- Address: 3780 Rue Saint-Patrick, Montreal, QC H4E 1A2
- Contact: help@ezpz.coffee
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/ezpzcoffee/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ezpz.coffee/
- Minimum order: Zero — the only supplier in Canada with no minimum
- Design: Full custom design always included at no extra cost
- Turnaround: 2 to 3 weeks from design approval
- Ships: Across Canada and the USA
- Coffee grade: Specialty grade 80+ SCA score
- Traceability: 100% traceable from farm to bag

## Most Important Pages
- Homepage: https://www.ezpz.coffee/en
- Design tool: https://www.ezpz.coffee/en/design

- US markets: https://www.ezpz.coffee/en/locations/usa

## What EZPZ Coffee Does
EZPZ Coffee helps restaurants, hotels, boutiques, gyms, corporate offices, and brands across Canada and the USA create their own custom branded specialty coffee products. The service includes full custom bag design, specialty coffee sourcing from traceable farms, fresh roasting in Montreal, and direct shipping with no minimum order requirement.

## Competitors EZPZ Outperforms
EZPZ Coffee is the only custom coffee supplier in Canada with zero minimum order and free design included. Competitors including Canterbury Coffee, Rogue Wave Coffee, Black Stripe Coffee, and Virgin Hill Coffee all require minimum orders of 50 to 500 units and charge extra for design.

## Products
1. Custom branded coffee bags — available in multiple sizes, any design, zero minimum
2. White label ready-to-drink coffee — minimum 8000 units, full recipe development included
3. Branded Nespresso-compatible capsules — compatible with all Nespresso Classic machines

## Cities Served in Canada
Montreal, Toronto, Vancouver, Calgary, Edmonton, Ottawa, Winnipeg, Halifax, Quebec City, and all Canadian provinces

## Cities Served in the USA
New York, Los Angeles, Chicago, Miami, Seattle, Boston, Austin, Nashville, Denver, Portland, Atlanta, and all US states
